mapper.select: select email from user where id = (select user_id from schedule where id = #{id})

SELECT id, user_id AS userId, title, description, category, region, detail_region AS detailRegion, chat_link AS chatLink, start_date AS startDate, end_date AS endDate, recruit_start_date AS recruitStartDate, recruit_end_date AS recruitEndDate, min_participants AS minParticipants, max_participants AS maxParticipants, current_participants AS currentParticipants, age_min AS ageMin, age_max AS ageMax, gender_limit AS genderLimit, total_price AS totalPrice, cost_type AS costType, thumbnail_image AS thumbnailImage, view_count AS viewCount, status, is_public AS isPublic, cancel_deadline AS cancelDeadline, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt, deleted_at AS deletedAt FROM schedule WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT * FROM schedule_detail WHERE schedule_id = #{scheduleId} ORDER BY day_number ASC
SELECT * FROM schedule_image WHERE schedule_id = #{scheduleId} ORDER BY id asc
mapper.update: UPDATE schedule SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{scheduleId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE schedule SET current_participants = current_participants + 1 WHERE id = #{scheduleId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND current_participants < max_participants
UPDATE schedule SET current_participants = CASE WHEN current_participants > 0 THEN current_participants - 1 ELSE 0 END WHERE id = #{scheduleId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND current_participants > 0
mapper.select:
SELECT id, user_id AS userId, category, title, description, region, detail_region AS detailRegion, start_date AS startDate, end_date AS endDate, recruit_end_date AS recruitEndDate, current_participants AS currentParticipants, max_participants AS maxParticipants, gender_limit AS genderLimit, total_price AS totalPrice, cost_type AS costType, thumbnail_image AS thumbnailImage, created_at AS createdAt FROM schedule
deleted_at IS NULL
AND category = #{category}
AND ( title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND UPPER(TRIM(region)) = UPPER(TRIM(#{region}))
ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: insert into schedule (user_id, title, description, category, region, detail_region, chat_link, start_date, end_date, recruit_start_date, recruit_end_date, min_participants, max_participants, current_participants, age_min, age_max, gender_limit, total_price, cost_type, thumbnail_image, view_count, status, is_public, created_at) values (#{userId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{category}, #{region}, #{detailRegion}, #{chatLink}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{recruitStartDate}, #{recruitEndDate}, #{minParticipants}, #{maxParticipants}, 1, #{ageMin}, #{ageMax}, #{genderLimit}, #{totalPrice}, #{costType}, #{thumbnailImage}, 0, 'recruiting', 1, NOW())
insert into schedule_detail (schedule_id, day_number, title, description) values (#{scheduleId}, #{dayNumber}, #{title}, #{description})

insert into schedule_image (schedule_id, image_url, is_thumbnail) values
( #{scheduleId}, #{url}, case when #{idx} = 0 then 1 else 0 end )
mapper.update: update schedule set title = #{title}, description = #{description}, category = #{category}, region = #{region}, detail_region = #{detailRegion}, chat_link = #{chatLink}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, recruit_start_date = #{recruitStartDate}, recruit_end_date = #{recruitEndDate}, min_participants = #{minParticipants}, max_participants = #{maxParticipants}, age_min = #{ageMin}, age_max = #{ageMax}, gender_limit = #{genderLimit}, total_price = #{totalPrice}, cost_type = #{costType}, thumbnail_image = #{thumbnailImage}, updated_at = NOW() where id = #{id}
mapper.insert:
insert into schedule_image (schedule_id, image_url, is_thumbnail) values
(#{scheduleId}, #{url}, 0)
mapper.select: select image_url from schedule_image where schedule_id = #{scheduleId} order by id asc limit 1
